title: scrophularia eriocalyx
intro: Scrophularia eriocalyx, also known as the Turkish scorpion grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, wounds, and inflammation. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting oxidative stress, and supporting immune function. Scrophularia eriocalyx can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate colds, fever, and other conditions.
